subcodes.first_line: O friends of the Abhá Beauty! If ye but knew how glorious is this address and how exalted are they who are thus addressed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دوستان جمال ابهی اگر بدانید که این خطاب چه قدر عظیم است و مخاطبها چه قدر
subcodes.subjects: @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @praise and encouragement, @predictions and prophecies, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
